 `./apps/web/src/app/[locale]/og/route.tsx`

```text
     1→import { readFile } from 'node:fs/promises'
     2→import { join } from 'node:path'
     3→
     4→import type { Image } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     5→import {
     6→  AggregateController,
     7→  createClient,
     8→  NoteController,
     9→  PageController,
    10→  PostController,
    11→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
    12→import { fetchAdaptor } from '@mx-space/api-client/dist/adaptors/fetch'
    13→import { ImageResponse } from 'next/og'
    14→import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
    15→
    16→import { API_URL } from '~/constants/env'
    17→import { defaultLocale } from '~/i18n/config'
    18→import zhMessages from '~/messages/zh/common.json'
    19→
    20→const messagesMap = {
    21→  en: () => import('~/messages/en/common.json').then((m) => m.default),
    22→  ja: () => import('~/messages/ja/common.json').then((m) => m.default),
    23→} as const
    24→
    25→const apiClient = createClient(fetchAdaptor)(API_URL, {
    26→  controllers: [
    27→    PostController,
    28→    NoteController,
    29→    PageController,
    30→    AggregateController,
    31→  ],
    32→})
    33→
    34→export const runtime = 'nodejs'
    35→
    36→export const revalidate = 86400
    37→
    38→const fontSearchDirs = [
    39→  // Linux (most common paths)
    40→  '/usr/share/fonts/truetype',
    41→  '/usr/share/fonts/opentype',
    42→  '/usr/local/share/fonts',
    43→  '/usr/share/fonts',
    44→  // Linux distro/Docker variants
    45→  '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/lxgw-wenkai',
    46→  '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/lxgw',
    47→  '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/chinese',
    48→  // macOS common paths (local dev)
    49→  '/Library/Fonts',
    50→  process.env.HOME ? join(process.env.HOME, 'Library/Fonts') : '',
    51→].filter(Boolean)
    52→
    53→const isVercel = process.env.VERCEL === '1'
    54→
    55→async function loadFont(
    56→  fileNames: string[],
    57→  fallbackUrl?: string,
    58→): Promise<ArrayBuffer | null> {
    59→  for (const fileName of fileNames) {
    60→    for (const dir of fontSearchDirs) {
    61→      try {
    62→        const font = await readFile(join(dir, fileName))
    63→        // @ts-expect-error
    64→        return font
    65→      } catch {
    66→        continue
    67→      }
    68→    }
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  if (!isVercel && fallbackUrl) {
    72→    try {
    73→      return await fetch(fallbackUrl).then((res) => res.arrayBuffer())
    74→    } catch {
    75→      return null
    76→    }
    77→  }
    78→
    79→  return null
    80→}
    81→
    82→const cjkRegex = /[\u3040-\u30FF\u3400-\u4DBF\u4E00-\u9FFF\uF900-\uFAFF]/u
    83→
    84→const isLatinOnly = (value?: string) => {
    85→  if (!value) return true
    86→  return !cjkRegex.test(value)
    87→}
    88→
    89→export const GET = async (
    90→  req: NextRequest,
    91→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ locale: string }> },
    92→) => {
    93→  try {
    94→    const { locale } = await params
    95→    const { searchParams } = req.nextUrl
    96→    const dataString = searchParams.get('data') as string
    97→
    98→    let data:
    99→      | { type: 'post'; category: string; slug: string }
   100→      | { type: 'note'; nid: number }
   101→      | {
   102→          type: 'page'
   103→          slug: string
   104→        }
   105→
   106→    const aggregation =
   107→      await apiClient.aggregate.getAggregateData<AppThemeConfig>('shiro')
   108→
   109→    try {
   110→      data = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(dataString))
   111→    } catch {
   112→      return new Response('Failed to parse the data.', { status: 400 })
   113→    }
   114→
   115→    const messages =
   116→      locale &&
   117→      locale !== defaultLocale &&
   118→      messagesMap[locale as keyof typeof messagesMap]
   119→        ? await messagesMap[locale as keyof typeof messagesMap]()
   120→        : zhMessages
   121→
   122→    let document: {
   123→      title: string
   124→      subtitle: string
   125→      meta: any
   126→      images: Image[] | undefined
   127→      id: string
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    switch (data.type) {
   131→      case 'post': {
   132→        const { category, slug } = data
   133→        document = await apiClient.post
   134→          .getPost(category, slug, { lang: locale })
   135→          .then((r) => ({
   136→            title: r.title,
   137→            subtitle: r.category.name,
   138→            meta: r.meta,
   139→            images: r.images,
   140→            id: r.id,
   141→          }))
   142→        break
   143→      }
   144→
   145→      case 'note': {
   146→        const { nid } = data
   147→        document = await apiClient.note
   148→          .getNoteByNid(+nid, { lang: locale })
   149→          .then((r) => ({
   150→            title: r.data.title,
   151→            subtitle: messages.nav_notes,
   152→            meta: r.data.meta,
   153→            images: r.data.images,
   154→            id: r.data.id,
   155→          }))
   156→        break
   157→      }
   158→      case 'page': {
   159→        const { slug } = data
   160→        document = await apiClient.page.getBySlug(slug).then((data) => ({
   161→          title: data.title,
   162→          subtitle: data.subtitle || '',
   163→          meta: data.meta,
   164→          images: data.images,
   165→          id: data.id,
   166→        }))
   167→        break
   168→      }
   169→    }
   170→
   171→    const { subtitle, title } = document
   172→    const useGeist = isLatinOnly(title) && isLatinOnly(subtitle)
   173→    const fontFamily = isVercel
   174→      ? 'system-ui, sans-serif'
   175→      : useGeist
   176→        ? 'Geist, system-ui, sans-serif'
   177→        : '"LXGW WenKai", system-ui, sans-serif'
   178→
   179→    const [fontData, fontDataBold] = useGeist
   180→      ? await Promise.all([
   181→          loadFont(['Geist-Regular.ttf']),
   182→          loadFont([
   183→            'Geist-SemiBold.ttf',
   184→            'Geist-Medium.ttf',
   185→            'Geist-Bold.ttf',
   186→          ]),
   187→        ])
   188→      : await Promise.all([
   189→          loadFont(['LXGWWenKai-Regular.ttf']),
   190→          loadFont(['LXGWWenKai-Medium.ttf']),
   191→        ])
   192→
   193→    const {
   194→      user: { avatar },
   195→      seo,
   196→      theme,
   197→    } = aggregation
   198→    const ogAvatar = theme?.config.module?.og?.avatar || avatar
   199→
   200→    if (!title) {
   201→      return new Response(
   202→        'Failed to generate the OG image. Error: The title is required.',
   203→        { status: 400 },
   204→      )
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    return new ImageResponse(
   208→      <div
   209→        style={{
   210→          height: '100%',
   211→          width: '100%',
   212→          display: 'flex',
   213→          flexDirection: 'column',
   214→          alignItems: 'flex-start',
   215→          justifyContent: 'center',
   216→          backgroundColor: '#fefefe',
   217→
   218→          padding: '60px 80px',
   219→          overflow: 'hidden',
   220→          position: 'relative',
   221→        }}
   222→      >
   223→        {/* Paper Texture - Multiple gradient layers to simulate grain */}
   224→        <div
   225→          style={{
   226→            position: 'absolute',
   227→            top: 0,
   228→            left: 0,
   229→            right: 0,
   230→            bottom: 0,
   231→            background:
   232→              'radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.008) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.008) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 80%, rgba(0,0,0,0.006) 0%, transparent 40%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 20%, rgba(0,0,0,0.006) 0%, transparent 40%)',
   233→          }}
   234→        />
   235→
   236→        {/* Vignette / Paper Shadow */}
   237→        <div
   238→          style={{
   239→            position: 'absolute',
   240→            top: 0,
   241→            left: 0,
   242→            right: 0,
   243→            bottom: 0,
   244→            background:
   245→              'radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, transparent 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.02) 100%)',
   246→          }}
   247→        />
   248→
   249→        {/* Bottom Gradient */}
   250→        <div
   251→          style={{
   252→            position: 'absolute',
   253→            left: 0,
   254→            right: 0,
   255→            bottom: 0,
   256→            height: '180px',
   257→            background:
   258→              'linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.01) 40%, transparent 100%)',
   259→          }}
   260→        />
   261→
   262→        {/* Header - Site Info */}
   263→        <div
   264→          style={{
   265→            position: 'absolute',
   266→            top: '50px',
   267→            left: '80px',
   268→            display: 'flex',
   269→            alignItems: 'center',
   270→          }}
   271→        >
   272→          <img
   273→            height={36}
   274→            src={ogAvatar}
   275→            width={36}
   276→            style={{
   277→              borderRadius: '50%',
   278→              marginRight: '14px',
   279→            }}
   280→          />
   281→          <span
   282→            style={{
   283→              fontSize: '22px',
   284→              fontWeight: 500,
   285→              color: '#555',
   286→              letterSpacing: '-0.01em',
   287→            }}
   288→          >
   289→            {seo.title}
   290→          </span>
   291→        </div>
   292→
   293→        {/* Main Content - Vertically Centered */}
   294→        <div
   295→          style={{
   296→            display: 'flex',
   297→            flexDirection: 'column',
   298→            alignItems: 'flex-start',
   299→            justifyContent: 'center',
   300→            maxWidth: '1000px',
   301→            fontFamily,
   302→          }}
   303→        >
   304→          <div
   305→            style={{
   306→              fontSize: title.length > 30 ? '60px' : '72px',
   307→              fontWeight: 600,
   308→              letterSpacing: '-0.03em',
   309→              lineHeight: 1.15,
   310→              color: '#1a1a1a',
   311→              marginBottom: '20px',
   312→            }}
   313→          >
   314→            {title}
   315→          </div>
   316→          {subtitle && (
   317→            <div
   318→              style={{
   319→                fontSize: '28px',
   320→                fontWeight: 400,
   321→                color: '#888',
   322→                letterSpacing: '-0.01em',
   323→              }}
   324→            >
   325→              {subtitle}
   326→            </div>
   327→          )}
   328→        </div>
   329→      </div>,
   330→      {
   331→        width: 1200,
   332→        height: 630,
   333→        fonts: [
   334→          fontData && {
   335→            name: useGeist ? 'Geist' : 'LXGW WenKai',
   336→            data: fontData,
   337→            weight: 400,
   338→            style: 'normal',
   339→          },
   340→          fontDataBold && {
   341→            name: useGeist ? 'Geist' : 'LXGW WenKai',
   342→            data: fontDataBold,
   343→            weight: 600,
   344→            style: 'normal',
   345→          },
   346→        ].filter(Boolean) as any[],
   347→        headers: {
   348→          'Cache-Control':
   349→            'public, max-age=86400, s-maxage=86400, stale-while-revalidate=86400',
   350→        },
   351→      },
   352→    )
   353→  } catch (e: any) {
   354→    return new Response(`Failed to generate the OG image. Error ${e.message}`, {
   355→      status: 500,
   356→    })
   357→  }
   358→}
   359→
```
